chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D-1064 of 2021 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.18537/2021. 2. For hearing of CMA No.18538/2021. 3. For hearing of CMA No.4449/2021. 4. For hearing of main case. 02.09.2021 Mr. Mukesh Kumar G. Karara, advocate and Mr. Nabi Bukhsh Leghari, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Rehmat un Nisa, advocate for the respondent No.2. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, Deputy Attorney General and Mr. Hussain Bohra, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Saifullah, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. ********** Learned counsel for the petitioner after arguing the matter at length concedes that he would not press this petition. Accordingly, this petition, alongwith pending applications, is hereby dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Khuhro/PA
